personal.name: Yulius Giann
personal.title: Software Developer
personal.bio: Full-stack developer in Jakarta building Vue frontends, Go backends, and GCP-deployed production systems.

projects.title: Rentalnow.id
projects.description: Motorcycle rental marketplace for fleet owners and customers across Jakarta.
projects.problem: Rental operators were managing inventory and bookings through WhatsApp and paper records, with no real-time visibility into fleet availability.
projects.outcome: Shipped a live platform at rentalnow.id — operators now manage their fleet, track orders, and handle bookings from a single dashboard with calendar integration.

projects.title: Task Management App
projects.description: Real-time collaborative task board with drag-and-drop and team assignment.
projects.problem: A startup team was losing track of work across Slack threads and spreadsheets, with no clear ownership or deadline visibility across projects.
projects.outcome: Delivered a real-time task board with socket-based live updates and drag-and-drop — the team adopted it as their primary planning tool within a week.

projects.title: Weather Dashboard
projects.description: Location-aware weather dashboard with interactive forecast charts and alerts.
projects.problem: Raw weather API responses were hard to interpret for end users who needed actionable, visual forecasts without reading JSON data.
projects.outcome: Open-sourced a mobile-first dashboard with interactive charts, location-based alerts, and 7-day forecasts built on the OpenWeather API.

projects.title: Social Media Analytics
projects.description: Automated analytics dashboard for social metrics with trend detection and reporting.
projects.problem: A marketing team was manually pulling data from multiple platforms to build weekly reports, spending several hours per week on repetitive data work.
projects.outcome: Automated dashboard with trend detection and scheduled PDF reports replaced the manual process — reports that took hours now run on a schedule.

experience.description: Led development of microservices architecture, mentored junior developers, and improved system performance by 40%.
Developed and maintained full-stack web applications using React and Node.js, collaborated with cross-functional teams.
